Why it's such a deal right now

Once you hold the card, about ₹9,000 of value comes straight — the miles and status. Another ~₹9,000 is there for the taking if you don't need the miles and convert Reward Shop vouchers into gift cards. The math sits well below what most people pay just in joining fees elsewhere.

The essentials

Basics of the card

Everything that matters before you apply — fees, the limited-period welcome bonus, earn rates and the one list you must plan around.

  • +5,000 miles after ₹50k cumulative in the same window

⚠ The big exclusions list

Some categories earn zero miles

There's a large exclusion list where you earn no miles at all — rent, utilities, government, education, wallets, insurance and more. Plan your spends around it so you're not burning through the welcome window on categories that pay nothing.

The welcome bonus most people miss

Etihad Silver & Gold status

As part of the welcome, Etihad hands you Silver and then Gold tier. Here's exactly how each one triggers — and why it's worth the small effort.

Silver Tier

Triggered on your first swipe

  • Fires on the first card transaction — usually arrives in 7–10 days.
  • Lets you choose 2 custom benefits. Pick Reward Shop Vouchers (that choice gives you 2 vouchers), plus any other — it doesn't matter which.
  • The 2 voucher codes appear immediately. Copy and save them — they vanish once you hit Gold.
Gold Tier

One small points purchase away

  • Triggers on your first Etihad.com transaction within 6 months. After 5 Aug, you'll need ₹10k+ on Etihad.com to trigger it.
  • It also works on points.com buys. The cheapest route is buying a minimum bundle of points:
Trigger via points.com

Click one of the links below to trigger the Gold Tier via points.com. Marriott is the cheaper one.

Marriott — Buy 1k points for $12.5 spend Etihad — Buy 1k points for $32 spend
  • Gold lands within 2–4 days of that transaction, then lets you choose 4 custom benefits — picking Reward Shop Vouchers here gives you 4.

What Gold actually gets you

Priority check-in, boarding & baggage
Fast-track immigration where available
Standard seat selection for you + 1
50% bonus miles on Etihad
Complimentary Chat Wi-Fi + 25% off internet
4 custom benefits: lounge, chauffeur, home check-in, refunds, extra baggage, vouchers
Tips & tricks · the meat of it

How to pull ₹18,000 back

~₹9,000 is straightforward. The other ~₹9,000 comes from turning Reward Shop vouchers into gift cards if you don't need the miles. Follow it in order. You'll want a (free) Etihad account, and a (free) Marriott account if you use the cheapest Gold trigger.

Part A

Getting to Silver & Gold tiers

Excluded categories still count toward the first-transaction, ₹25k and ₹50k milestones — so this part is easy to knock out.

  1. Do your first transaction — anywhere

    Any spend works to trigger the Silver flow (even excluded categories count for these milestones).

  2. Wait for the Silver email (7–10 days)

    You'll get a confirmation that Silver Tier is active.

  3. Choose Reward Shop Voucher as a custom benefit

    Hit “Choose your Custom Benefits” and pick Reward Shop Voucher — this gives you 2 vouchers. Pick any second benefit; it doesn't matter.

  4. Save the 2 voucher codes right away

    They're available immediately. Copy and store them — they disappear once you reach Gold.

  5. Trigger Gold with a small points buy

    Buy the minimum 1,000 Marriott points for $12.5 to trigger Gold — if you're before 5 Aug. Buy Marriott points
    After 5 Aug you'll need to spend ~$104 to trigger it (ideally not on buying points).

  6. Wait for the Gold email (2–4 days)

    Gold Tier confirmation lands within a few days of that transaction.

  7. Choose Reward Shop Voucher again — for 4 vouchers

    At Gold, picking Reward Shop Voucher gives you 4 vouchers. Choose the other 3 benefits based on what you'd actually use flying Etihad.

  8. Save all 4 Gold voucher codes

    They're visible immediately. You now hold 6 voucher codes total — 2 from Silver, 4 from Gold.

Part B

Cashing out the ₹18,000

Now you convert those 6 voucher codes into Flipkart SuperCoin gift cards on the Etihad Reward Shop.

  1. Get at least 401 Etihad miles into your account

    You need a small miles balance to check out. Either complete ₹25k spend in 60 days then wait ~60 more for the first 10k miles — or transfer in from another card (e.g. 500 Axis Edge Miles → 1,000 Etihad Miles in ~20 hours; HDFC and others work too).

  2. Have your 6 voucher codes handy

    2 from Silver + 4 from Gold. Log in at rewards.etihad.com

  3. Open All categories → Gift Cards & Vouchers

  4. Pick the Flipkart SuperCoin Voucher

  5. Choose the ₹500 voucher, quantity 3 → Buy Now

  6. Apply a voucher code → Pay 37 Miles

    Paste your first Reward Shop code, hit Apply Code, and the price drops to a token amount. Then pay.

  7. Repeat for the other 5 codes

    Each order delivers 3 SuperCoin vouchers to your inbox in ~3 days. Across all 6 codes you'll land ₹9,000 of SuperCoin vouchers — usable as 9,000 SuperCoins in Flipkart, or in apps like GoSats
    Once they arrive, follow redeeming those vouchers to get the coins into Flipkart.

  8. Then decide what to do with the 15,000 miles

    Once conditions are met you'll still have 15,000 Etihad miles. Fly them (India–UAE, India–Sri Lanka on SriLankan, and more), or if you're not flying, repeat the steps above with the slider pushed fully to miles.

    Not flying? Push the slider all the way to miles before Buy Now — you can grab a 5,000-SuperCoin voucher in one go. Build your balance to 17,000 miles and you can buy the 10,000-SuperCoin voucher outright.
The last mile

Redeeming those SuperCoin vouchers

Buying the vouchers is only half the job — each one still has to be claimed and pushed into your Flipkart account. It's fiddly and repetitive, so here's the exact route with every screen you'll see.

What you're redeeming
18 gift cards6 orders × 3 gift cards of ₹500
Daily cap
10 per daySo do 9 one day, 9 the next
SuperCoins expiry
6 monthsFrom the day they land in Flipkart

  1. Open your Reward Shop account

    Head to rewards.etihad.com and log in.

  2. Go to Transactions

    Click the round person icon next to your name, then choose My transactions.

  3. Click View Gift Cards

    Find your SuperCoin voucher order and click View Gift Cards. Each order opens up into three separate gift cards.

  4. Claim the first gift card

    Open the first one, click Claim Here, tick the “I'm not a robot” check, then hit Redeem. You'll be handed a SuperCoins voucher code and a PIN — keep them on screen.

  5. Enter the code on the SuperCoin claim page

    Go to flipkartsupercoin.woohoo.in , punch in the voucher code and PIN, then click Check Balance to Redeem.

  6. Verify with your mobile number

    Enter your mobile number, agree to the terms, and put in the OTP you receive.

  7. 500 SuperCoins land in your Flipkart account

    That's one gift card done. The coins are credited straight to Flipkart and carry a 6-month expiry, so plan to actually use them.

  8. Don't be fooled by the screen that comes next

    Close the congratulations banner and you'll land back on what looks like the same voucher-entry screen — but typing the next code straight in there throws an error.

    Click the SuperCoin logo at the top first, and only then enter your next voucher code and PIN.

  9. Now repeat it another 17 times

    Easy peasy — just do the above 18 times in total (sarcasm fully intended). There's a hard limit of 10 claims in any 24-hour window, so the practical split is 9 vouchers one day and 9 the next.

My take
There's seriously too much value here for what you spend. It's a no-brainer — go for it already.
